page_metadata.biotools__summary: A database of metal ions in DNA and RNA. Complies info on innersphere, outsphere, and larger coordination environment of >70,000 metal ions of 36 elements fround in >2000 structures of nucleic acids.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A database of metal ions in DNA and RNA. Complies info on innersphere, outsphere, and larger coordination environment of >70,000 metal ions of 36 elements fround in >2000 structures of nucleic acids.
